title: Minevane Pack
description: This is the official modpack for the Minevane New Zealand Minecraft server! It includes a bunch of optimisation mods + other features to make your survival experience that much better!
body:
This is the official modpack for the Minevane New Zealand Minecraft server! It includes a bunch of optimisation mods + other features to make your survival experience that much better!

Mods included in this modpack include:
